{{Quote|Get away from me, do you hear?! This is mine! Mine, mine, mine! I'm not sharing it with anyone!|Dafi to the other members of her gang|<ref name="marvel79" />}}
'''Dafi''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] member of a [[Color/Legends|green]]-skinned [[near-Human]] [[Species/Legends|species]] and a member of a [[Lemo and Sanda's gang|gang]] led by [[Human/Legends|Human]] thugs [[Lemo]] and [[Sanda]] based on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Arcan IV]] during the [[Imperial Era/Legends|Imperial Period]]. In [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]], Dafi and the gang had a fateful encounter with [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] agents [[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]] and [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]], who had come to Arcan IV looking for information on the whereabouts of their friend [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]]. After luring them in with hints about the location of the valuable artifacts known as the [[Dancing Goddess]] and the [[Minstrel]], Calrissian accidentally revealed his identity, prompting the gang to chase him through the streets. Calrissian's [[Speeder/Legends|speeder]] ultimately crashed, causing the Minstrel statue—spilling into the streets at Dafi's feet. Dafi immediately decided to keep the artifact for herself, going so far as to open fire on the members of her former gang after taking possession of the Minstrel.<ref name="marvel79" />
